name: mb-smart-product-wiki
description: Ministry Brands Smart Product Wiki Plugin. Three skills for product teams: the Knowledgebase Maker (builds a two-page product knowledgebase, a Knowledge Base Overview dashboard plus a Knowledgebase deep reference, from a guided interview and live product walkthrough; both deliverables are delivered as Confluence-paste-ready markdown), the Knowledgebase Assistant (helps you query, update, audit, and walk Knowledgebase Integrity against specific tasks), and the Persona Maker (creates data-informed user personas with gap analysis and validation guides). All KBs save to the MB Design Ops Confluence template at https://ministrybrands.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/DR/pages/6534463521/Product+Name+Knowledge+Base+Overview.
